description: Udaipur is a royal paradise nestled in the heart of Rajasthan, surrounded by serene lakes, magnificent palaces and a magical old-world charm. Often called the Venice of the East, Udaipur offers a breathtaking experience — from sunset boat rides on Lake Pichola to exploring the grand City Palace, colourful bazaar streets, heritage havelis and picture-perfect ghats. The city combines romance, culture and luxury in every corner. Whether you’re discovering ancient Rajput history, enjoying authentic Rajasthani cuisine, or relaxing in a lakeside café watching the palace glitter in the night lights — Udaipur promises memories that stay forever.

faqs.title: 1) What is the best time to visit Udaipur?
faqs.content: October to March is the best season because the weather is pleasant for sightseeing.

faqs.title: 2) What are the main attractions that we will visit?
faqs.content: City Palace, Lake Pichola Boat Ride, Fateh Sagar Lake, Sajjangarh Monsoon Palace, Jagdish Temple, and local markets.

faqs.title: 3) Is boat ride included?
faqs.content: Boat ride can be arranged on request. Charges may vary based on private / sharing boat.

faqs.title: 4) Are monuments entry fees included?
faqs.content: Entry charges are usually extra unless specifically mentioned in the package.
